title: 2 Ducats - Frederik III

obverse.description: Crowned and draped bust of King Frederick III facing right, with long and curly hair.
obverse.lettering: FRID : III : D : G : REX : DAN : NOR : VAN : GOT :
obverse.unabridged_legend: Fridericus III, Dei gratia, rex Daniae, Norvegiae, Vandalorumque, Gothoruque.
obverse.lettering_translation: Frederick III, by the grace of God, King of Denmark, Norway, the Wends, and the Goths.

reverse.description: Crowned three-parted shield with arms of Norway, Sweden and Norway mounted over big cross. The shield is inside a circle with King's motto as legend outside, along rim. Date is divided at sides of shield (in different ways, see below), while mint master initials may be in legend divided by the crown or at sides of shield.

comments:
This coin has two variant:
Type 1 Mint master initials are in same line of legend, divided at sides of crown. Date is divided by shield and horizontal arms of cross with a cypher for quadrant placed horizontally instead of vertically, starting from upper right and clockwise.

Type 2 Date and mint master initials are divided at sides of shield. Date is above horizontal arms of cross, initials are below.
